title: worktree 작업의 landing을 로컬 main 워킹트리를 건드리지 않고 origin/main으로 병합·푸시하도록 강제한다 — 동시 세션이
source_request: worktree 작업은 항상 origin/main 에 병합, 푸시하는거야. 이거 코드로 구현하고(cli 또는 skill 등 있다면), 이 규칙이 어디에서든 반드시 지켜지도록 강제해
goal: worktree 작업의 landing이 로컬 공유 main 워킹트리를 건드리지 않고 worktree 브랜치 커밋을 origin/<기본브랜치>로 직접 push하도록 바꾸고, 로컬 main 병합 경로를 제거해 구조적으로 강제한다

acceptance_criteria.statement: worktree land가 worktree 브랜치 커밋을 origin/<기본>로 직접 push하고, 로컬 공유 main 체크아웃에 git merge/commit을 절대 하지 않는다(로컬 main HEAD·워킹트리 불변) — 구조적 강제

evidence.command: grep LAND_PUSH_TIMEOUT_MS git.ts -> 660_000 at :252 applied :316; LAND_RECOVERY_TIMEOUT_MS 120_000 :258; no orphan LAND_ATTEMPT_TIMEOUT_MS
bun test git.test.ts+worktree-drive+worktree-lifecycle -> 56 pass/0 fail; RED(120000<600000)->GREEN
bunx tsc --noEmit -> 0 errors; biome exit 0
worktree full suite (pre-fix impl) -> 4942 pass, ac-oracle env-only fail unrelated
bun test tests/core/git.test.ts -> 12 pass/0 fail; grep orphan LAND_ATTEMPT_TIMEOUT_MS -> none; ditto acg-review -> 0 high-risk without evidence
bun test worktree-lifecycle 28 pass / git 12 pass / push-gate 31 pass / worktree-drive 16 pass
full worktree suite: 4933 pass / 11 skip / 1 fail (ac-oracle env-only, not in change surface, passes on main)
bun run adr:check -> knowledge adr-check: OK

acceptance_criteria.statement: 원격이 앞선(non-FF) 경우 origin/<기본> fetch → worktree 커밋을 rebase(선형, merge커밋 회피) → 재push하고, rebase 충돌 시 멈추고 인계한다(force-push·조용한 오적용 없음, 반복 race는 bounded retry)

re_entry.command: # resolve the land blocker, then re-run: ditto autopilot complete --workItem wi_2607156f8

These are likely files an owner changed but did NOT report in its record-result changed_files (change_surface under-declaration), or genuinely unrelated concurrent work. Next: check the owners' reported changed_files against `git status`, then either expand the work item's changed_files to include the real run output, or stash the unrelated work — then re-run `ditto autopilot complete`. (Run byproducts under .ditto/memory are auto-absorbed; these paths are not.)
